titleStmt.title: SII 34.153: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 153. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: It refers to the seventh year of some king. But the beginning part of the inscription containing king's name not available. It records a unanimous decision (amaivu-kachcham) of the Periyanāḍu assembly comprising the grāmas (that is the brahmadēya villages), the nāḍu (the Veḷḷāḷa villages) and the nagarams of the locality (name lost) around Kuḻittaṇḍalai, which seems to have met in the temple. The decision related to the punishments to be meted out to those who collect unjust taxes (anniyāya-kaḍamai) and to the village accountants and others who collude with those tax collectors. The intended punishments to the culprits were plucking of eyes and cutting of the noses (in the case of Brāhmaṇas), death (for the village accountants), ex-communication for artisans, etc. Finally, to mark the important occasion, the periyanāḍu decided to collect from the kār season of the seventh year some fixed quantity of grain or labour (kuḍimai kuṟuṇi) from each of the member villages towards the making and maintenance of the compound wall of the temple called Periyanāṭṭān-tirumāḷigai (named after the assembly).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mak koruvarkku Uṭaṟpaṭṭu Eymukamuṅ kuṭuttu kōṭ kuṟaḷai kē
kuṭikēṭu keṭuttā ruṇṭākilum Aṉṉiyāyaṅkaḷukku Uṭaṟ paṭṭāruṇ
pirāmaṇarākil kaṇṇum paṟittu mūkkum Aṟukka kaṭavatākavum I
kkūṉi paṭṭānākil ceytavaṉukku tōṣa miṉṟikkēyirukka E
m yē māriyākil paṉṟiyiloṉṟāka kuttuṇṇakkaṭavaṉākavum
rāmaṅkaḷ nakaraṅkaḷil kaṭamai kuṭimaikkaṉṟiyilē Aṉṉiyāyakkaṭamai
ḷiruvaraippiṇaittum kuṟṟam kuṟṟamaṉṟiyilē teṟṟa kuṟṟattukku taṇṭami
llātākavum nāṭupeṟṟuvanta mutal kavaḷamutal kāṇummiṭattu kirāmamum nāṭum nakara
ṇakkaṭavōmākavum Ūṟkaṇakkar Aṉṉiyāyak kaṭamaikku taraveḻutak kaṭavatallavākavum
vīrakkoṭiyār kaiyyālē kulai Uṇṇakkaṭavakaḷākavum Ippaṭi tavira Oruvariruvar
kil nāṭāka kuṭivāṅkipōkak kaṭavōmākavum kuṭivāṅka Irukkacceytē nam
ḻutikkuḻamuṭṭākal mēḻipaṭṭattārellāraiyum paṉṟiyiloṉṟāka vīrakkoṭiyārē
Ivarkaḷ cettāl Ivarkaḷ piṇamum paṉṟiyiloṉṟum nāyppiṇamumāka
māḷar kollar taccar Uḷḷiṭṭa paṇicamakkaḷ nāṭu kuṭivāṅki Irukkac cey�
ṭākil vīrakoṭiyār paṇiyē cātaṉamāka kollak kaṭavakaḷākavum Uṭaiyār
ṭayanāyanārkku Ēḻāvatu kār mutal periya nāṭṭāṉ tirumāḷikaikku brahma talaiyāka
ṉ kaṭaiyāka kuṭimai kuṟuṇikku Araināḷ kaṭṭattumta
ṉam kuṟuṇi nellum kuṭukka kaṭavōmākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Amaivukka
ṭomum kirāmaṅkaḷōmum nakaraṅkaḷōmum Ivvaṉaivōm nāṭukaḷum nakara
paṇiyāl Amaivu kaccameḻutiṉēṉ bramadacaṅ kuḻit taṇṭalai mattiyataṉ ku
ṭaiyāṉ tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇaṉ tiruttān tōṉṟiyāṉa Eḻunūṟṟuva
ṭu paṇiyāl marutūr Uṭaiyāṉ periya nāṭṭu vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ātaṉūr nāṭum kirāma
karaṅkaḷum paṇiyāl cōḻakula māṇikkac caruppētimaṅkalattu pirama piriyaṉ Eḻuttu kuṟunaṉ
karam paṇiyālum Aiññūṟṟuva vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvi
vīramākāḷam jeyam kuḻitteṇṭalai mattyattaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ Āti
Digital edition of SII 34.153 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
